chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7551 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.31455/2017 2. For hearing of main case 18.03.2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Mr. Javaid Hussain advocate holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel for respondent impugned notices are being withdrawn forthwith, hence, petition may be disposed of. Learned counsel for the petitioner consents to the same. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
